text:
(a) The Texas Department of Motor Vehicles shall adopt rules that conform with 49 C.F.R. Part 387 requiring motor carriers operating foreign commercial motor vehicles in this state to maintain financial responsibility.

(b) This chapter prevails over any other requirement of state law relating to financial responsibility for operation of foreign commercial motor vehicles in this state.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 648. Foreign Commercial Motor Transp.
##### § 648.102 — Financial Responsibility

(a) The Texas Department of Motor Vehicles shall adopt rules that conform with 49 C.F.R. Part 387 requiring motor carriers operating foreign commercial motor vehicles in this state to maintain financial responsibility.

(b) This chapter prevails over any other requirement of state law relating to financial responsibility for operation of foreign commercial motor vehicles in this state.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 127, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: This chapter prevails over any other requirement of state law relating to financial responsibility for operation of foreign commercial motor vehicles in this state.
